articles.description: While the government has assured that there is no shortage, people across the countries are panic buying and queuing up outside depots and filling stations.

articles.title: Eleven Indians charged in US over staged convenience store robberies, visa fraud
articles.description: U.S. federal prosecutors charged eleven Indian citizens with conspiracy to commit visa fraud for staging robberies.

articles.title: Air India schedules 80 flights linking Dubai, Abu Dhabi, Jeddah, Muscat, Riyadh with Indian cities — details here
articles.description: Air India and Air India Express will operate 62 additional flights on March 14 to support stranded travellers amid ongoing Middle East conflict. This is in addition to 18 scheduled flights. Check details about 80 flights linking Gulf countries with Indian cities here.

topStories.title: Dubai Hit Again In Less Than 24 Hours, US Embassy In Baghdad Targeted
topStories.description: A building in Dubai's financial hub has been hit by debris from an intercepted attack. This is the second such attack in less than 24 hours as the US-Israel-Iran war enters day 15. No fire occurred,...

topStories.title: Wall Street Week Ahead: Investors await Fed rate outlook as Iran war keeps markets on edge
topStories.description: Global markets are keenly watching the US Federal Reserve this week for insights into interest rate cut timelines, as the Middle East conflict fuels oil price surges and economic uncertainty. Policymakers will assess the impact of the energy shock on inflation and growth, potentially delaying anticipated rate reductions.

topStories.title: What are the changes being proposed to Transgender Persons (Protection of Rights) Act, 2019 | Explained
topStories.description: How is the government proposing to alter the definition of “transgender person”? Why has it argued for the omission of the right to “self-perceived gender identity”? What about the proposed changes have raised concerns among the trans community? What has the Supreme Court laid down in the landmark 2014 judgement recognising a third gender beyond male and female and the right to self-determination of gender identity?

dailyNews.description: JD Vance alleges $19 billion in fraud was discovered in Minneapolis, and the Trump administration may target California for its next major federal investigation.

dailyNews.title: Trump welcomes PRCA, WPRA champions at White House in return of rodeo tradition
dailyNews.description: Rodeo buckle winners visited the White House for the first time in more than four decades when President Donald Trump hosted PRCA and WPRA world champions.

dailyNews.title: White House erupts over CNN report claiming Trump team underestimated Iran response on Hormuz
dailyNews.description: The White House press secretary denied a CNN report claiming the Trump team was unprepared for the potential Iranian closure of the Strait of Hormuz, calling it "fake news."

dailyNews.title: Trump Kennedy Center's new leader revealed as Ric Grenell exits top role
dailyNews.description: Ric Grenell is stepping down as the Trump Kennedy Center president as the venue shifts focus to major renovations. VP Matt Floca is taking over leadership.

dailyNews.title: Cuban president reveals talks with Trump admin as fuel blockade chokes domestic energy supply and economy
dailyNews.description: Cuba confirmed talks with the Trump administration amid an economic crisis after Venezuela oil was cut off. President Miguel Díaz-Canel cites aim to resolve differences.

dailyNews.title: Trump says US ‘obliterated’ military targets in strike on key Iranian oil hub: 'Powerful bombing raids'
dailyNews.description: President Trump said the U.S. bombed Iran’s Kharg Island, a key Iranian oil export hub, and warned against interference in the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: Trump’s Move to Seize Oil Tankers Costs the U.S. Tens of Millions of Dollars
dailyNews.description: Although President Trump said seizing tankers would be a financial boon, the cost of maintaining just one aging ship has already reached $47 million.

dailyNews.title: More Marines and Warships Being Sent to Middle East, U.S. Officials Say
dailyNews.description: Iran’s response to days of aerial bombardment and long-range artillery strikes has proved more resilient than Trump administration officials anticipated.

dailyNews.title: Judge Quashes Justice Dept.’s Subpoenas of Fed, Crippling Its Pursuit of Trump’s Rivals
dailyNews.description: Judge James E. Boasberg derided the U.S. attorney’s office in Washington for pursuing a case against Jerome H. Powell that appeared to be motivated by President Trump’s desire for vengeance.

dailyNews.title: Kennedy Center’s President, Richard Grenell, Is Leaving After a Tumultuous Year
dailyNews.description: Since Richard Grenell was appointed by President Trump, the arts center has endured waves of cancellations and departures. It will soon close for lengthy renovations.

dailyNews.title: Judge Temporarily Blocks Trump Demand for Student Race Data
dailyNews.description: A group of Democratic attorneys general had sued to overturn the Trump administration’s new policy that demanded the past seven years of student application data.

dailyNews.title: TikTok Investors Set to Pay $10 Billion Fee to Trump Administration
dailyNews.description: The large fee is the latest example of the White House’s inserting itself into corporate deal making in unusual and aggressive ways.
